reviews.review_description: the controls are clunky and annoying. the game is annoying as hell. as someone who plays many rage games this is probably the worst i've ever played. i played for 15 minutes and wasn't able to pass the second obstacle. it was one of the farthest jump i've ever made in a hand locomotion game this is the second obstacle  by the way. highly do not recommend playing. game only tells you the time it took you to get to that area how high you are

Better than a lot of other sloppy climbing games out there. Controls are a little clunky, but it’s easy to get used to. I’d say the game being paid is a lil cheesy, but a dev’s gotta do what a dev’s gotta do I guess
